rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The cited rule, Educ. Code §25.0022, governs food allergy information requests upon school enrollment. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 25.0022. FOOD ALLERGY INFORMATION REQUESTED UPON ENROLLMENT.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
